_source: ADA Standards for Accessible Design (2010), IBC Chapter 11, ICC A117.1-2017

parking._note: Required accessible spaces per IBC Table 1106.1
parking.van_accessible_ratio: 1 in every 6 accessible spaces must be van-accessible

restrooms.required_fixtures_note: At least one accessible toilet room per floor/level served by an elevator

doors.hardware: Lever or loop handles required (no round knobs)

exits.area_of_rescue_required: Required in buildings with accessible floors above or below grade-level exit
exits.signage: Accessible egress signs required at all accessible exit routes

exceptions: Buildings with accessible ground-floor use only
